slides.content:
I work at Nuit Noire Tattoo in Geneva. 
All my tattoos are made without the aid of a machine.
Most of my designs are inspired by the history of tattooing and Swiss folk art, and can be tattooed several times.

I also take some personal projects. 
If it's too far from my work, I'll do my best to recommend other tattooers.
Discover more on @jolan_chappaz and don't hesitate to contact me if you have any questions.
